journal_entry.description: Purchase of raw materials for R&D of new snack product
journal_entry.rationale: Raw materials purchased specifically for research and development are expensed immediately as R&D expense under Canadian accounting standards (ASPE and IFRS). The materials are not intended for inventory or production but for experimental development of a new product. Cash decreases as payment is made by cheque.

output_debit_classifier.reason: Materials purchased for R&D purposes are expensed immediately rather than capitalized to inventory. This is a standard treatment under Canadian accounting standards where R&D costs (including materials consumed in R&D activities) are typically expensed as incurred. Expense increases (debit), cash decreases (credit).
